title: secale dighoricum
intro: Secale dighoricum, also known as false smut or dog's tail, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the wheat family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Secale dighoricum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Secale dighoricum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
